name: Patient 28
history: History of self-critical tendencies. Used to maintaining control and achieving goals. Current challenges with job seeking, relationships, family.
intermediate_belief: If I'm not in perfect control, I'm failing.
intermediate_belief_depression: My lack of control over life proves I'm fundamentally flawed.
coping_strategies: Over-planning, criticism of self and others, black-and-white thinking.
situation: Conflict related to Ivan's approach to job searching and life decisions.
auto_thought: "He's so irresponsible. Why can't he be more like me? I need to fix this."
behavior: Gives unsolicited advice, creates spreadsheet for Ivan, becomes irritable when advice ignored.
